# Continuum

> Continuum is an AI-powered project management platform that cuts through the noise of dense, legacy tools. It gives project managers and teams a clear hierarchy for sprint planning, frictionless time tracking, and instant invoicing — in one unified workspace. Built and hosted with South African POPIA compliance at its core.

Continuum is currently in private beta. Teams join a waitlist for early access at https://joincontinuum.co.za. The waitlist is the primary call to action across the site.

## What Continuum does

- **Frictionless execution & recording**: Team members click to start tracking time directly on a task — no separate timesheet tool, no manual reconciliation.
- **Seamless invoicing**: Tracked time flows straight into invoices, removing the need to chase timesheets or reconcile data across disconnected systems.
- **Role-based access control (RBAC)**: Packaged roles (Admin, Project Manager, Developer, View Only, Contractor) let admins control exactly what each member sees and edits per project. Clients get a curated, read-only view of milestones and progress — never the raw sprint board.
- **Continuum AI**: A read-only-by-default assistant that handles planning, task drafting, and status updates in the background without changing what is on the sprint board.
- **Easy migration**: Import existing boards from Jira (CSV), Trello (JSON), Asana (CSV), or generic CSV. No forced cutover — run both tools in parallel, preview the import, adjust mappings, then apply. A first sprint can be live in under an hour.

## Security & compliance

Continuum is built with South Africa's Protection of Personal Information Act (POPIA) in mind. Safeguards include encryption in transit, role-based access controls, and POPIA-aligned data retention. Production data runs on managed cloud infrastructure (PostgreSQL and application services deployed via Railway). Sensitive credentials such as OAuth tokens and client API keys are stored encrypted or hashed, never in plaintext. Continuum does not sell personal information. The Information Officer can be reached at info@joincontinuum.co.za.

## Key questions

- **Is Continuum POPIA compliant?** Yes. Privacy practices, user rights, and the Information Officer contact are documented, with technical and organisational safeguards aligned to POPIA.
- **Who can see my team's sprint board?** Only invited project members with the right permissions. Clients and view-only members see curated milestones and progress, not internal diagnostics.
- **Can I control what each team member sees?** Yes, via role-based access control with customisable permission bundles per project.
- **Which tools can I import from?** Jira, Trello, Asana, and generic CSV exports.
- **How fast can a team start?** Most teams can have a first sprint live in under an hour.

## Links

- Home / waitlist: https://joincontinuum.co.za
- Contact / Information Officer: info@joincontinuum.co.za

## Reference

- POPIA (Protection of Personal Information Act, South Africa): https://www.gov.za/documents/protection-personal-information-act
